commands.review_summary:
This PR adds an optional `summary` field to `after_compaction` plugin hook payloads, forwards compaction summaries from direct and engine-owned compaction paths, gates delivery through `allowConversationAccess`, and updates related docs/tests.

PR surface: Source +47, Tests +88, Docs +19, Generated 0. Total +154 across 18 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a plugin hook feature/API expansion rather than a bug report with a failing current-main path. Source inspection confirms current main omits summary text from public `after_compaction` payloads, and the PR body shows a local hook-runner proof of the new policy behavior.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow repair lane can update the stale CLI docs; maintainer approval of the API/security-boundary direction remains separate from that mechanical docs fix.

target.title: feat(plugins): expose compaction summary with hook opt-in
target.body:
Fixes #61447.

## Summary
- Adds optional `summary` to `after_compaction` hook payloads when compaction produced summary text.
- Gates summary delivery behind the existing `plugins.entries.<id>.hooks.allowConversationAccess` policy.
- Keeps default/non-trusted `after_compaction` handlers on metadata-only payloads.
- Documents `after_compaction.summary` as transcript-derived sensitive content.

## Notes
This intentionally does not expose summaries by default, so metadata-only compaction observers keep the current behavior and summary access remains aligned with the existing conversation-access trust boundary.

## Real behavior proof (required for external PRs)

- Behavior or issue addressed: `after_compaction` can now carry compaction summary text, while untrusted/default plugin hooks still receive only metadata.
- Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw worktree on Linux, running this PR branch with the actual `src/plugins/hooks.ts` hook runner through `node --import tsx`.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: Ran a local Node proof that imports `createHookRunner`, registers two real `after_compaction` handlers, and calls `runner.runAfterCompaction(...)` with a payload containing `summary: "redacted local proof summary"`.
- Evidence after fix (screenshot, recording, terminal capture, console output, redacted runtime log, linked artifact, or copied live output): Copied terminal output from the local proof run:

```console
$ node --import tsx --input-type=module
[
  {
    "plugin": "metadata-only",
    "hasSummary": false,
    "keys": [
      "compactedCount",
      "messageCount",
      "sessionFile",
      "tokenCount"
    ]
  },
  {
    "plugin": "trusted",
    "hasSummary": true,
    "summary": "redacted local proof summary",
    "keys": [
      "compactedCount",
      "messageCount",
      "sessionFile",
      "summary",
      "tokenCount"
    ]
  }
]
```

- Observed result after fix: The metadata-only handler did not receive a `summary` key; the trusted handler did receive `summary` alongside the existing compaction metadata.
- What was not tested: I did not run a full live Gateway conversation compaction against a real chat account for this PR.
- Proof limitations or environment constraints: This proof exercises the real hook runner and policy path locally, but uses a minimal local registry rather than a packaged Gateway process.
- Before evidence (optional but encouraged): Existing issue #61447 describes the missing summary field; current tests and types previously exposed only counts/session metadata.

## Testing
- `pnpm config:docs:check`
- `pnpm tsgo:core:test`
- `node scripts/test-projects.mjs src/plugins/hooks.security.test.ts src/plugins/loader.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/compact.hooks.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.timeout-triggered-compaction.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.overflow-compaction.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/compact.hooks.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/compact.queued.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/compact.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/compaction-hooks.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.overflow-compaction.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.timeout-triggered-compaction.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.ts src/config/schema.help.ts src/plugins/hook-types.ts src/plugins/hooks.security.test.ts src/plugins/hooks.test-helpers.ts src/plugins/hooks.ts src/plugins/loader.test.ts src/plugins/registry.ts`
- `pnpm lint --threads=8`
- `node scripts/test-projects.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.timeout-triggered-compaction.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.timeout-triggered-compaction.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
